nasb.text: then Sanballat and Geshem sent a message to me, saying, “Come, let us meet together at Chephirim in the plain of Ono.” But they were planning to harm me.

esv.text: Sanballat and Geshem sent to me, saying, “Come and let us meet together at Hakkephirim in the plain of Ono.” But they intended to do me harm.

cnv.text: 參巴拉和基善就差派人來見我說：“請你來，我們在阿那平原上的一個村莊會面吧！”其實他們想要謀害我。

ccb.text: 参巴拉和基善就派人告诉我说：“来，我们在阿挪平原的一个村庄见面吧。”其实他们想要害我。
